OneLogin.QueryJwtPrivateKeyFile: <Only supply if the environment has no access to the key vault e.g. dev environment>
OneLogin.QueryJwtPublicKeyFile: <Only supply if the environment has no access to the key vault e.g. dev environment>
OneLogin.StateJwtPrivateKeyFile: <This should be empty in production so that the key vault is the source of the key>
OneLogin.StateJwtPublicKeyFile: <This should be empty in production so that the key vault is the source of the key>
